en.title: Register to vote
en.description: All you need to register to vote is 5 minutes and your National Insurance number.

cy.title: Cofrestru i bleidleisio
cy.description: Y cwbl sydd ei angen arnoch i gofrestru i bleidleisio yw 5 munud a’ch rhif Yswiriant Gwladol.

en.title: Voting by post
en.description: Find out about voting by post in UK elections

cy.title: Pleidleisio drwy’r post
cy.description: Methu mynd i dy orsaf bleidleisio ar y diwrnod pleidleisio? Gwna gais i bleidleisio drwy'r post ac fe gei di becyn pleidleisio drwy’r post cyn yr etholiad.

en.title: Apply to vote by proxy
en.description: If you can't get to the polling station on polling day, you can ask someone you trust to cast your vote on your behalf.

cy.title: Gwneud cais i bleidleisio drwy ddirprwy
cy.description: Os na allu di gyrraedd yr orsaf bleidleisio ar y diwrnod pleidleisio, gallu di ofyn i rywun rwyt ti’n ymddiried ynddo i fwrw dy bleidlais ar dy ran. Gelwir hyn yn bleidlais trwy ddirprwy.

en.title: Voter ID
en.description: You need to show photo ID to vote at polling stations in some elections.

cy.title: ID Pleidleisiwr
cy.description: Mae angen i chi ddangos ID ffotograffig i bleidleisio mewn gorsafoedd pleidleisio mewn rhai etholiadau.

en.title: Northern Ireland Assembly
en.description: The Northern Ireland Assembly represents the people of Northern Ireland. Northern Ireland Assembly elections usually take place every five years

cy.title: Cynulliad Gogledd Iwerddon
cy.description: Mae Cynulliad Gogledd Iwerddon yn cynrychioli pobl Gogledd Iwerddon. Fel arfer cynhelir etholiadau Cynulliad Gogledd Iwerddon bob pum mlynedd

en.title: Voting in Senedd elections
en.description: The Senedd represents the people of Wales. Senedd elections take place every five years.

cy.title: Pleidleisio yn Etholiadau'r Senedd
cy.description: Mae’r Senedd yn cynrychioli pobl Cymru. Mae etholiadau’r Senedd yn cael eu cynnal bob pum mlynedd

en.title: Scottish Parliament
en.description: The Scottish Parliament represents the people of Scotland. It has the power to make decisions and pass laws in certain areas

cy.title: Senedd yr Alban
cy.description: Yma mae mwy o wybodaeth am Senedd yr Alban, gan gynnwys ei gyfansoddiad ac am beth mae'n gyfrifol

en.title: Police and Crime Commissioners
en.description: Police and Crime Commissioners make sure that the local police in their area are meeting the needs of the community

cy.title: Comisiynwyr yr Heddlu a Throseddu
cy.description: Mae Comisiynwyr yr Heddlu a Throseddu yn sicrhau bod yr heddlu lleol yn eu hardal yn diwallu anghenion y gymuned

en.title: Voting in mayoral elections
en.description: Find out about mayoral elections in England and how the voting system works

cy.title: Pleidleisio mewn etholiadau maerol
cy.description: Mae pedwar math o faer yn Lloegr. Mae'r math o faer neu feiri sydd gennych yn dibynnu ar ble rydych chi'n byw

en.title: Mayor of London and London Assembly
en.description: The Mayor of London and London Assembly represent the people living in London.

cy.title: Maer Llundain a Chynulliad Llundain
cy.description: Mae Maer Llundain a Chynulliad Llundain yn cynrychioli'r bobl sy'n byw yn Llundain

en.title: UK parliamentary by-elections
en.description: UK parliamentary by-elections happen when a seat in the House of Commons becomes vacant between general elections.

cy.title: Is-etholiadau Senedd y DU
cy.description: UK parliamentary by-elections happen when a seat in the House of Commons becomes vacant between general elections.

en.title: UK Parliament
en.description: The UK Parliament represents the people of the United Kingdom. It makes decisions and passes laws on a wide range of issues that affect you. Find out more

en.title: Local council by-elections
en.description: Local council by-elections happen when a councillor leaves their seat during their term

cy.title: Is-etholiadau cynghorau lleol
cy.description: Mae is-etholiadau cynghorau lleol yn digwydd pan fydd cynghorydd yn gadael ei sedd yn ystod ei dymor

en.title: Local councils
en.description: Find out about local councils and how to vote in local council elections.

en.title: Types of elections
en.description: Find out more about the types of elections in the UK.

cy.title: Mathau o etholiadau
cy.description: Darganfyddwch ragor am y mathau o etholiadau a gynhelir yn y DU.

en.title: Voter information
en.description: Everything you need to know about voting in UK elections

cy.title: Pleidleisio ac etholiadau
cy.description: Dysgwch bopeth sydd angen ei chi wybod am bleidleisio ac etholiadau, gan gynnwys gwybodaeth am etholiadau sydd i ddod yn eich ardal.
